detail: Restated zero items from prior year. Auditor unchanged for 7 consecutive years. Working capital reconciliation matches investor day presentation within 0.4 percent.
Promoted internal VP of Engineering to CTO following 9 month succession plan disclosed in prior proxy.
CEO compensation 73 percent tied to 3-year rolling ROIC and free cash flow per share. No single-year performance gates.
Reclassified two product lines into a new segment. Prior period comparable revenue restated downward by 6 percent in old segment.
CFO Peter Lansing previously announced retirement in 2027 now extended indefinitely per board request.
Disclosed informal SEC inquiry into revenue recognition practices Q3 2024 through Q2 2025. Company states matter is non-material.
CEO compensation 81 percent tied to current year revenue. No multi-year metrics.
Disclosed elevated SMB churn risk explicitly in risk factors. Provided cohort retention data by customer size segment for the first time.
Announced 240M acquisition of a complementary product company. Paid 4.1x trailing revenue. Funded with 60 percent stock 40 percent cash.
CEO compensation 55 percent tied to 3-year ROIC 30 percent to revenue growth 15 percent to ESG goals.
Disclosed multi-year R&D reinvestment plan with explicit margin trajectory through 2029.
Authorized 300M repurchase program. Filing notes repurchases only when stock trades below a stated intrinsic value range.
CEO compensation 68 percent tied to 3-year metrics. Compensation flat YoY despite stock appreciation.
Priced IPO at 24 dollars per share. Disclosed CAC payback of 18 months with 'expected to improve to 12 months by Year 2 post listing.'
CAC payback now 26 months versus 18 months at IPO. Footnote notes change in calculation methodology.
Chief Revenue Officer departed for 'personal reasons' after 14 months in role. No successor named.
Confirmed achievement of all three operational milestones laid out in 2024 turnaround plan filed as Exhibit 99.1.
Repurchased 2.4 percent of shares outstanding at average price of 31.40. Stock currently trades at 37.10.
CEO compensation 70 percent tied to multi-year metrics. Voluntary 30 percent CEO salary reduction in 2024 not yet restored.
CFO Dan Powers departed effective immediately. Interim CFO appointed. No reason given.
Withdrew prior FY guidance.
Changed definition of 'recurring revenue' to include certain one-time professional services. Prior period comparable not restated.
CEO received special retention grant of 8.5M RSUs vesting in 12 months. Filed three weeks before guidance withdrawal.
